title: Matthew Perry: Chandler Bing's funniest moments in Friends
paragraphs: This video has been removed for rights reasons.
Actor Matthew Perry, who played the part of Chandler Bing in US sitcom Friends, has died at the age of 54.
Law enforcement sources told US media the actor was found dead at his home in Los Angeles.
Friends aired from 1994 until 2004 and followed the lives of six young friends living in New York City.
Perry starred as the awkward Chandler Bing, famous for his sarcastic one-liners. Here are some of his best bits.
